channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 63/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 63/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 29.5%.

item.title: The Telegraph: Rayner embroiled in ‘election fraud row’ - The Telegraph
item.description: Rayner embroiled in ‘election fraud row’ - The Telegraph

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Senior civil servants to get bonuses for first time to reward ‘doers, not talkers’
item.description: Senior civil servants to get bonuses for first time to reward ‘doers, not talkers’

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Prospect of Labour leadership race brings out different sides of rivals
item.description: Prospect of Labour leadership race brings out different sides of rivals

item.title: BBC Politics: Ministers want new voting system in place for possible Manchester mayor race
item.description: Ministers want new voting system in place for possible Manchester mayor race

item.title: BBC Politics: Starmer says he will campaign for Burnham in Makerfield
item.description: Starmer says he will campaign for Burnham in Makerfield

item.title: ITVX: Starmer says he 'wants to be a part of' Burnham's Makerfield campaign - ITVX
item.description: Starmer says he 'wants to be a part of' Burnham's Makerfield campaign - ITVX

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): TUC leader ‘angry’ at state of Labour but says it can recover to win next election
item.description: TUC leader ‘angry’ at state of Labour but says it can recover to win next election

item.title: FT UK Politics: The impact of falling net migration on Britain and its prime minister
item.description: The impact of falling net migration on Britain and its prime minister

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Progressives must unite behind Andy Burnham in Makerfield | Letters
item.description: Progressives must unite behind Andy Burnham in Makerfield | Letters

item.title: FT UK Politics: Five arrested over claims of electoral fraud in Angela Rayner’s constituency
item.description: Five arrested over claims of electoral fraud in Angela Rayner’s constituency
